name: 8ra / IPCEI-CIS
lede: The EU funding project for a multi-provider cloud-edge continuum - the federating backbone.
facts: 12 member states, ~120-150 industry and research partners, 19 direct projects.
EUR 1.2B of public funding, approved by the European Commission in late 2023.
The Lab8ra testbed links 14 organisations across five countries.
Contributes to the EU goal of 10,000 edge nodes by 2030 - provider-independent and federated.
